results.proof:
theorem p02 (n : Nat) : n + 0 = n := by induction n with
| zero => rfl
| succ n ih => simp [Nat.add, ih]
results.reason: lean_accepted: elaborated clean (no error, no sorry)

results.proof:
theorem p03 (n : Nat) : 0 + n = n := by
  induction n with
  | zero => rfl
  | succ n ih => rw [Nat.add_succ, ih]
results.reason: lean_accepted: elaborated clean (no error, no sorry)

results.decl: theorem p04 (a b : Nat) : a + b = b + a
results.proof:
theorem p04 (a b : Nat) : a + b = b + a := by
  induction a
  case zero =>
    simp [Nat.add_zero, Nat.zero_add]
  case succ a ih =>
    rw [Nat.add_succ, Nat.succ_add, ih]

theorem p05 (p : Prop) : p → p := by
  intro hp
  exact hp
results.reason: lean_accepted: elaborated clean (no error, no sorry)

results.decl: theorem p06 (p q : Prop) (h : p ∧ q) : q ∧ p
results.proof:
theorem p06 (p q : Prop) (h : p ∧ q) : q ∧ p := by
  cases h with | intro hp hq =>
  constructor
  exact hq
  exact hp
results.reason: lean_accepted: elaborated clean (no error, no sorry)

results.proof: theorem p07 (n : Nat) : n ≤ n := by exact Nat.le_refl n
results.reason: lean_accepted: elaborated clean (no error, no sorry)

results.proof:
theorem p08 (n : Nat) : 0 < n + 1 := by
  induction n with
  | zero => simp
  | succ n _ => simp [Nat.succ_lt_succ]
results.reason: lean_accepted: elaborated clean (no error, no sorry)

results.decl: theorem p09 (n : Nat) : 2 * n = n + n
results.proof:
theorem p09 (n : Nat) : 2 * n = n + n := by induction n with
| zero => rfl
| succ m ih => rw [Nat.mul_succ, Nat.add_succ, Nat.add_succ, ih]

results.decl: theorem p10 (l : List Nat) : l ++ [] = l
results.proof:
theorem p10 (l : List Nat) : l ++ [] = l := by
  induction l with
  | nil => rfl
  | cons h t ih => simp [List.append, ih]
results.reason: lean_accepted: elaborated clean (no error, no sorry)

results.decl: theorem p11 (a b c : Nat) : a * (b + c) = a * b + a * c
results.proof:
theorem p11 (a b c : Nat) : a * (b + c) = a * b + a * c := by
  induction c with
  | zero => simp [Nat.add_zero, Nat.mul_zero]
  | succ n ih => 
    rw [Nat.add_succ, Nat.mul_succ, ih, Nat.add_succ, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.mul_succ]
results.reason: lean_accepted: elaborated clean (no error, no sorry)

results.decl: theorem p12 (p q : Prop) (h : p ∨ q) : q ∨ p
results.proof: theorem p12 (p q : Prop) (h : p ∨ q) : q ∨ p := by cases h with | inl hp => exact Or.inr hp | inr hq => exact Or.inl hq
results.reason: lean_accepted: elaborated clean (no error, no sorry)
